start.speaker: Pliable
start.text: Tell me again of the city ahead. Is it bright?
start.text_zh: 再告诉我前面的那座城吧。它明亮吗？

choices.text: The promise is great, but the road may be hard.
choices.text_zh: 应许是大的，但道路也可能艰难。

reward.speaker: Pliable
reward.text: Then I will think of the reward. That is easier than the road.
reward.text_zh: 那我就想着奖赏吧。那比想着道路容易。
